input.purchase: Our team, the IT team, wants to buy laptop for the entire department. We are a team of 15 but we only have a budget of 14000 euros. Please help us find good laptops. The RAM must be 32 GB.
input.organisation_context: We are a team of 15 people. Our company is a software company that makes software for supermarkets. Category: laptops. No vendor filter selected.
success_factors: Select the strongest vendor for Our team, the IT team, wants to buy laptop for the entire department. We are a team of 15 but we only have a budget of 14000 euros. Please help us find good laptops. The RAM must be 32 GB..

criteria.label: RAM Capacity
criteria.description: Must provide 32GB of RAM to support software development workloads.

criteria.label: Performance & Latency
criteria.description: Processor and hardware capability to ensure low latency for development environments.

criteria.label: Unit Price
criteria.description: Cost per unit to ensure the total for 15 laptops remains under the 14,000 EUR budget.

criteria.label: Warranty & Support
criteria.description: Cost and duration of hardware support included in the purchase price.

criteria.label: German Legal Compliance
criteria.description: Hardware and vendor practices must comply with German consumer and data protection laws.

criteria.label: Vendor Reliability
criteria.description: Stability of the vendor to provide consistent hardware and long-term support.

criteria.label: Strategic Fit
criteria.description: Alignment of hardware durability and performance with the needs of a software development team.
